title: M4-subset predicates over runs
manager: A built-in subset of run-predicates — `reached_state`, `in_config`, `is_legal_run`, `never_entered` — that evaluate over a recorded run (an M3 tape) without needing the full expression language. This is milestone 4's early half: it lets you ask concrete questions about what actually happened in a run right now, straight off the replay engine, while the full property language waits for the P2 expression language to mature.
cs: M4-subset predicates (reached_state/in_config/is_legal_run/never_entered) over M3 runs (Tjssm-827); no P2 dependency by design; the full property language is era 3; jssm twin #828.
